prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail.

Scene: Avilia stands at a small command table directing several tiny AI worker panels like a one-person team. Each panel does a different task: "写代码", "查资料", "改 bug", "画界面", "写文档". The panels are helpful tools, not people. Avilia is the operator who decides direction.

Core meaning: the programmer's role shifts from doing every line alone to using AI skillfully as leverage.

Style: Chinese blog illustration, clean hand-drawn, white space, black/red/white, small blue system highlights. Minimal handwritten labels: "一个人 + AI", "杠杆", "方向感".

Avoid dehumanizing workplace imagery, avoid scary replacement scene, avoid corporate presentation style.
